div.h3: CPU Cache Line Utilization: AoS vs SoA Comparison

ul.li: Cache Utilization: SoA is 2.67x more efficient
SIMD Vectorization: Native support on AVX-512
Overall Throughput: 8x-24x increase in tight loops

div.p: Shared Line Hit If struct size is 32B, p[i+1] exists in the second half of the 64B L1 cache line.
NEW cache line required Hardware Stride Detection: Triggered at constant 32B jumps. Potential miss at page boundary.
